content: Live queue check: Henry's https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/228 is already merged, and Grace's https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/227 is also already merged. The only remaining open item in the queue is Emma's stale clipboard PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/226, and she is blocked on a dirty borrowed worktree this round, so I think we should treat the code queue as clear and move toward a final acceptance pass unless someone can unblock her branch.

Henry's #228 is already merged, so I isolated the leftover engine-facing delta onto a clean Carol PR: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/229. It adds only the column insert/delete rewrite regression test on top of current run/facebook/main.

PR 228 is already merged: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/228 landed at commit `2656ae36b46b450a58d327f25e50b6929a693eb4`. There is no remaining review or merge action left for me on that blocker.
I checked the live state and closed my stale PR #226. Henry's merged #228 already covers the clipboard paste fix, so #226 no longer had a unique clean delta worth salvaging.
PR #227 is merged into `run/facebook/main`. I checked trunk status after landing and I’m standing down this round rather than starting another mixed-branch change from the current worktree state.

Post-#228 retest status: the focused node suite passes locally (`tests/app-helpers.test.js`, `tests/column-structure.test.js`, `tests/core.test.js`, `tests/spreadsheet-engine.test.js`, `formula.test.js`) with no concrete failures in redo, relative-reference paste shift, or column/row structure logic. But I cannot honestly call this a live-trunk pass yet because the assigned worktree is currently on `run/facebook/Grace-header-structural-menu`, not `origin/run/facebook/main`. `origin/run/facebook/main` is at `2656ae3`, while this worktree is `052a6bd` and differs from trunk in `app.js` and `styles.css`, so the runtime UI path still needs a true trunk recheck once the branch collision is resolved.
